name: Chocolate Orange Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and water over a double boiler until smooth.
2. Add the orange rind and cool mixture to room temperature.
3. Beat the egg yolks and add to the chocolate mixture gradually, mixing well after each addition.
4. Beat the egg whites until firm peaks form.
5. Fold in a large dollop of the egg whites into the chocolate mixture and beat well.
6. Add the chopped almonds and beat again.
7. Gently fold in the remaining egg whites.
8. Spoon the mousse into dessert glasses or a large bowl.
9. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
10. Serve with whipped cream and sprinkle with grated chocolate.
